title: Gemma 3 sparse-layer preset calibration
goal: Calibrate sparse multi-layer configurations and low/medium/strong presets on Gemma 3 to match Ramp-style quality tradeoffs.
constraints: Build multi-layer candidates only from Stage B hard-gate passers.
Include sparse global candidate near 23/29/35/41/47 and at least two dense control groups.
Record safe operating bands and cliff boundaries for each candidate configuration.
definition_of_done: Stage C artifact ranks sparse multi-layer candidates and includes preset calibration table.
Calibrated presets define low, medium, and strong operating points with degeneration thresholds.
Result includes clear fallback configuration and single-layer fallback behavior.
rollback_note: If preset calibration is inconsistent across concepts, freeze to medium-only preset and rerun calibration with expanded concept coverage.
